rows.label: xs33630100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Good grief[ST:wide ]— we've been hit by quite
an unexpected accident, haven't we.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33630100_MSG0020
rows.name:
Splitting our forces like this...
quite clever for a monster.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33630100_MSG0030
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—Ah, I have absolutely no issues, of course.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33630100_MSG0040
rows.name:
I was inspecting the enemy situation until you
arrived. My rough analysis is already complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33630100_MSG0050
rows.name:
Heh. Now that I have rendezvoused with you,
all matters are close to resolution.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33630100_MSG0060
rows.name:
If I earn military merit in this decisive battle,
I'll draw ever closer to the next commander's seat[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33630100_MSG0070
rows.name:
Now, no dawdling! The
enemy won't wait for us, after all![ST:wait ]
